countries.name: United States
countries.description: Home to the world's top-ranked universities with exceptional research, innovation, and OPT work opportunities for international graduates.
countries.visaRequirements: F-1 Student Visa. IELTS 6.5+ or TOEFL 90+ typically required.
countries.graduateOpportunities: OPT allows 12 months (36 months for STEM) of post-study work.

countries.name: United Kingdom
countries.description: Prestigious universities with shorter degree durations — 3-year UG and 1-year Masters — plus Graduate Route work visa.
countries.visaRequirements: Student Route visa. IELTS 6.0–7.0 depending on institution.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Graduate Route visa allows 2 years (3 years for PhD) post-study work.

countries.name: Australia
countries.description: High-quality education in a multicultural environment with strong post-study work rights and world-leading research universities.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Temporary Graduate visa (485) allows 2–4 years post-study work.

countries.name: Canada
countries.description: World-class universities, affordable tuition, multicultural cities, and clear post-graduation work permit pathways for international students.
countries.visaRequirements: Study Permit. IELTS 6.0–6.5 or equivalent English proof.
countries.graduateOpportunities: PGWP allows up to 3 years of post-study work; strong PR pathway.

countries.name: Germany
countries.description: Low or no tuition at public universities, Europe's engineering powerhouse, and strong industry links for STEM graduates.
countries.visaRequirements: Student visa + blocked account. IELTS/TOEFL or German proficiency depending on program.
countries.graduateOpportunities: 18-month job-seeker visa after graduation; EU Blue Card pathway.

countries.name: France
countries.description: Prestigious grandes écoles and universities with affordable public tuition and growing English-taught Masters programs.
countries.visaRequirements: Student visa (VLS-TS). IELTS 6.0+ for English programs.
countries.graduateOpportunities: APS visa allows 12 months to seek employment after graduation.

countries.name: Ireland
countries.description: EU tech hub with 1-year Masters, English-medium education, and strong graduate visa options for IT and pharma sectors.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Third Level Graduate Scheme — up to 2 years post-study work.

countries.name: New Zealand
countries.description: Safe, high-quality education with practical learning, stunning campuses, and straightforward post-study work visas.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Post-study work visa up to 3 years depending on qualification level.

countries.name: Singapore
countries.description: Asia's education hub with globally ranked universities, strong business schools, and proximity to Indian students.
countries.visaRequirements: Student Pass (IPA). IELTS/TOEFL for English-medium programs.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Employment Pass pathway for graduates with job offers.

countries.name: Netherlands
countries.description: 2,000+ English-taught programs, innovative teaching, and orientation year visa for international graduates.
countries.visaRequirements: MVV + residence permit. IELTS 6.0–6.5 for English programs.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Orientation Year permit — 1 year to find work after graduation.

countries.name: Italy
countries.description: Affordable EU education, rich cultural heritage, and growing English-taught Masters in design, engineering, and business.
countries.visaRequirements: Study visa (D-type). IELTS or proof of English-medium prior degree.
countries.graduateOpportunities: 12-month permesso di soggiorno for job search after graduation.

countries.name: Switzerland
countries.description: Home to ETH Zurich and EPFL — world-leading STEM, hospitality, and finance programs with strong industry placement.
countries.visaRequirements: National D visa. IELTS/TOEFL and strong academic profile.
countries.graduateOpportunities: 6-month job search permit for graduates; strong pharma & banking sectors.

countries.name: UAE
countries.description: Dubai and Abu Dhabi host branch campuses of global universities with tax-free earning potential and modern infrastructure.
countries.visaRequirements: Student residence visa sponsored by university. IELTS 5.5–6.5.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Employment visa sponsorship through UAE-based employers.

countries.name: Japan
countries.description: Cutting-edge technology, MEXT scholarships, and increasing English-taught programs at top national universities.
countries.visaRequirements: Student visa (COE required). JLPT or IELTS depending on program language.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Designated Activities visa for job hunting up to 1 year post-graduation.

countries.name: South Korea
countries.description: Rising destination for engineering, K-culture studies, and STEM with KGSP scholarships and English-taught programs.
countries.visaRequirements: D-2 Student visa. IELTS/TOEFL for English programs; TOPIK for Korean programs.
countries.graduateOpportunities: D-10 job-seeker visa for graduates seeking employment.

countries.name: Malaysia
countries.description: Affordable Asian destination with UK/Australian branch campuses, multicultural environment, and easy visa processing.
countries.visaRequirements: Student Pass. IELTS 5.5–6.0 for most programs.
countries.graduateOpportunities: Employment Pass for graduates with qualifying job offers.

countries.name: Sweden
countries.description: Innovation-driven education, sustainability focus, and English-taught Masters at globally respected universities.
countries.visaRequirements: Residence permit for studies. IELTS 6.5 for English programs.
countries.graduateOpportunities: 6-month residence permit extension to seek employment.

countries.name: Spain
countries.description: Affordable EU tuition, vibrant student cities, and growing English-taught business and engineering programs.
countries.visaRequirements: Student visa (Type D). IELTS for English programs; Spanish for others.
countries.graduateOpportunities: 12-month post-study residence authorization for job search.

countries.name: Finland
countries.description: World-leading education system, English-taught programs, and high quality of life with strong tech and design sectors.
countries.visaRequirements: Residence permit for studies. IELTS 6.0–6.5 for English programs.
countries.graduateOpportunities: 2-year residence permit extension to find work after graduation.
